raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The University of California has allowed for improper influence in admissions decisions.",
    "The University of California has not treated applicants fairly or consistently.",
    "The admissions process at the University of California can be capricious.",
    "Students may be denied equal opportunity to education based on the reviewer of their application.",
    "Proposed reforms include requiring policies and procedures to ensure a fair and impartial admissions process.",
    "Training for application reviewers on the consistent and unbiased use of admissions criteria will be required.",
    "An annual review process will be implemented to ensure adherence to new admissions requirements.",
    "There will be a requirement for a firewall between admissions staff and philanthropy staff to prevent pressure to admit students based on family donations.",
    "Admissions staff will have to verify a student athlete's athletic ability or talent prior to admissions."
  ]
}
```
